sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, values Array(UInt8), info String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT arrayLastOrNull(x -> x > 5, values) FROM test_table WHERE id != ANY (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE info = 'test1') GROUP BY id;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE NULL != ANY (SELECT arrayLastOrNull(x -> x IS NOT NULL, values) FROM test_table) HAVING count(values) > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id UInt32, val String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id FROM test_table_2 WHERE val != ANY (SELECT arrayLastOrNull(x -> length(x) > 0, arrayJoin([val, ''])) FROM test_table_2 WHERE id < 4) ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arrayLastOrNull(x -> x <= arrayJoin(values), values) as last_val FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING last_val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, arrayLastOrNull(x -> x != '', arrayJoin(values)) FROM test_table WHERE id != ANY (SELECT id FROM test_table_2) ORDER BY id ASC;
